words.meaning_en: The quality of being thankful; appreciation for kindness received
words.example_sentence: She expressed her gratitude with a heartfelt letter.
words.fill_blank: He felt deep ______ towards his teacher for all the support.

words.meaning_en: Feeling or expressing great happiness and triumph
words.example_sentence: The team was jubilant after winning the championship.
words.fill_blank: The crowd was ______ when the home team scored the winning goal.

words.meaning_en: To express grief or sorrow; to mourn
words.example_sentence: She lamented the loss of her old school friends.
words.fill_blank: The villagers began to ______ the passing of their beloved elder.

words.meaning_en: Unwilling and hesitant
words.example_sentence: He was reluctant to admit his mistake in front of everyone.
words.fill_blank: She was ______ to leave her hometown for a new city.

words.meaning_en: Calm, peaceful, and untroubled
words.example_sentence: The serene lake reflected the blue sky perfectly.
words.fill_blank: She felt ______ sitting by the quiet river at sunset.

words.meaning_en: Showing fondness or tender feelings
words.example_sentence: She gave her grandmother an affectionate hug.
words.fill_blank: He wrote an ______ letter to his old friend.

words.meaning_en: Anxious or fearful that something bad may happen
words.example_sentence: She was apprehensive about her board exam results.
words.fill_blank: He was ______ before his first public speech.

words.meaning_en: Cause someone to become perplexed and confused
words.example_sentence: The student was bewildered by the complex question.
words.fill_blank: She looked completely ______ when she saw the exam paper.

words.meaning_en: Perfect happiness; great joy
words.example_sentence: The cool breeze in summer was pure bliss.
words.fill_blank: She was in ______ when she received the scholarship.

words.meaning_en: To protect and care for lovingly; to hold dear
words.example_sentence: She cherished the memories of her childhood.
words.fill_blank: We should ______ the time we spend with loved ones.

words.meaning_en: Sympathetic concern for the sufferings of others
words.example_sentence: The doctor treated the poor patient with great compassion.
words.fill_blank: A good leader shows ______ towards those in need.

words.meaning_en: Sad and dispirited
words.example_sentence: He looked dejected after losing the competition.
words.fill_blank: The team was ______ after their unexpected defeat.

words.meaning_en: The complete loss of hope
words.example_sentence: He fell into despair when he failed the exam again.
words.fill_blank: Never give in to ______ — every problem has a solution.

words.meaning_en: Wanting to do or have something very much
words.example_sentence: The eager students raised their hands to answer.
words.fill_blank: She was ______ to begin her first day at the new school.

words.meaning_en: The ability to understand and share the feelings of another
words.example_sentence: A good counsellor has a lot of empathy for students.
words.fill_blank: She showed great ______ when her friend lost her father.

words.meaning_en: Feeling or showing envy of someone else's possessions
words.example_sentence: He was envious of his friend's new bicycle.
words.fill_blank: She felt ______ when her classmate won the prize.

words.meaning_en: Completely tired out
words.example_sentence: He was exhausted after the marathon.
words.fill_blank: The workers were ______ after harvesting all day.

words.meaning_en: Having no particular interest or care; unconcerned
words.example_sentence: She was indifferent to the outcome of the match.
words.fill_blank: He seemed ______ to the suffering around him.

words.meaning_en: Far away from other places or people; alone
words.example_sentence: The isolated village had no mobile network.
words.fill_blank: He felt ______ after moving to a new city.

words.meaning_en: Very unhappy or uncomfortable
words.example_sentence: The wet, cold day made everyone feel miserable.
words.fill_blank: He was ______ when his best friend moved away.

words.meaning_en: Hopeful and confident about the future
words.example_sentence: She was optimistic about passing the board exams.
words.fill_blank: Stay ______ even when things are difficult.

words.meaning_en: Tending to see the worst aspect of things
words.example_sentence: A pessimistic attitude can prevent you from trying new things.
words.fill_blank: Don't be ______ — every problem has a solution.

words.hindi: सहानुभूति / दूसरों की पीड़ा महसूस करना
words.meaning_en: Feelings of pity and sorrow for someone else's misfortune
words.example_sentence: She expressed sympathy for the victims of the earthquake.
words.fill_blank: The nurse showed ______ towards the frightened child.

words.meaning_en: Free from disturbance; calm and peaceful
words.example_sentence: The hillside village was tranquil and beautiful.
words.fill_blank: She found the forest walk ______ and refreshing.

words.meaning_en: Feeling or showing sympathy and concern for others
words.example_sentence: A compassionate teacher supports students through difficulties.
words.fill_blank: She was ______ towards the homeless children on the street.
